info.title: EverMemOS API
info.description: Enterprise-grade intelligent memory system for AI agents. Extracts, structures, and retrieves information from conversations.

tags.name: Memories
tags.description: Memory ingestion, retrieval, search, and deletion

post.description: Store batch messages into personal memory space. Messages are accumulated and boundary detection triggers memory extraction automatically.

post.description:
Retrieve structured memories using filters DSL with pagination. Supports episodic_memory, profile, agent_case, and agent_skill types.

## Filters DSL
Allowlist-based: only the following fields are processed, unknown fields are silently ignored.

| Field | Type | Operators | Description |
|-------|------|-----------|-------------|
| `user_id` | string | eq, in | User ID filter (conditional required) |
| `group_id` | string | eq, in | Group ID filter (conditional required) |
| `session_id` | string | eq, in, gt, gte, lt, lte | Session ID filter |
| `timestamp` | int (epoch ms/s) or ISO string | eq, gt, gte, lt, lte | Time range filter |
| `AND` | array | - | All conditions must match |
| `OR` | array | - | Any condition must match |

**Operator syntax**: plain value = eq, `{"in": [...]}`, `{"gte": v, "lt": v}`

422.description: Validation error (invalid parameter values, business rule violations)

value.message: filters must contain at least one of 'user_id' or 'group_id' at first level
memory_type must be one of: agent_case, agent_skill, episodic_memory, profile

post.description:
Unified memory search endpoint supporting multiple memory types and retrieval methods.

## Retrieval Methods
- **keyword**: BM25 keyword retrieval (Elasticsearch only)
- **vector**: Vector semantic retrieval (Milvus only)
- **hybrid** (default): Hybrid retrieval with rerank (ES + Milvus + Rerank)
- **agentic**: LLM-guided multi-round intelligent retrieval

## Memory Types
- **episodic_memory**: Episodic memory (ES + Milvus)
- **profile**: User profile (Milvus only)
- **raw_message**: Raw unprocessed messages (ES only)
- **agent_memory**: Agent memory - cases and skills (ES + Milvus)

## Filters DSL
Same syntax as the GET endpoint. Must contain at least one of `user_id` or `group_id`.

422.description: Validation error (invalid parameter values, business rule violations)

value.message: Unknown method: foo. Built-in: agentic, hybrid, keyword, vector

post.description:
Soft delete memories by ID or by filter conditions.

Two mutually exclusive modes:
- **By ID**: provide `memory_id` only (no other fields allowed)
- **By filters**: provide `user_id` and/or `group_id` (session_id, sender_id optional)

Filter semantics: omitted fields skip filtering; `null` or `""` matches null/empty records; string value = exact match.

422.description: Validation error (invalid parameter values, business rule violations)

value.message: When memory_id is provided, no other fields (user_id, group_id, session_id, sender_id) are allowed
Either memory_id must be provided, or at least one of user_id / group_id is required

post.description: Create a new group or update an existing one (upsert by group_id).

get.description: Retrieve a group's details by its group_id.

patch.description: Partially update a group's fields. At least one of name or description must be provided.

example.message: At least one of 'name' or 'description' must be provided

post.description: Create a new sender or update an existing one (upsert by sender_id).

get.description: Retrieve a sender's details by its sender_id.
Query the processing status of a specific async task by task_id. Task status is stored in Redis with a TTL of 1 hour. Internal status 'start' is mapped to 'processing' in the response.

404.description: Task not found or expired (TTL 1 hour)

post.description:
Generate a pre-signed S3 upload URL for multimodal content. Gateway transparently forwards to MMS service with auto-injected mms-token header. Upload signature valid for 15 minutes, download signature valid for 7 days.

**Note:** This endpoint is a transparent proxy to MMS. Request body must use `{objectList: [...]}` array wrapper. Response and error format follow MMS conventions (not the standard ErrorResponse schema used by other endpoints).

400.description: MMS validation error (status=200 with error field, MMS uses HTTP 200 for all responses)

500.description: MMS internal server error or Gateway proxy failure

get.description: Get the singleton global settings for this space.

example.message: Settings not found. Call PUT /api/v1/settings to initialize.

put.description: Update the global settings, or initialize them if they don't exist yet. Only provided fields are updated; omitted fields retain their current values.

BearerAuth.description: API key as Bearer token. Obtain from console dashboard.

ContentItem.description: Single content item in a message. This phase only supports type='text'.

text.description: Content body. For type='text', this is the actual text.

source.description: Content source (e.g., google_doc, notion, confluence, zoom)

MessageItem.description: Single message item for personal memories. Content accepts a plain string shorthand: "hello" is coerced to [{"type": "text", "text": "hello"}].

content.description: Content items array, or plain string shorthand

GroupMessageItem.description: Single message item for group memories. Each message must include sender_id to identify participants.

content.description: Content items array, or plain string shorthand

ToolCall.description: OpenAI-format tool call made by the assistant

AgentMessageItem.description: Agent trajectory message. Supports role='tool' in addition to 'user'/'assistant'. Does not support message_id or sender_name (stripped by Gateway).

content.description:
Message content. Conditional requirement by role:
- role='user': required, must not be empty
- role='assistant' with tool_calls: optional, can be null/empty/omitted (OpenAI compatible)
- role='assistant' without tool_calls: required, must not be empty
- role='tool': required (tool execution result)

tool_calls.description: Tool calls made by assistant (OpenAI format). Only when role='assistant'.

tool_call_id.description: ID of the tool call this message responds to. Required when role='tool'.

async_mode.description: Enable async processing. When true, returns 202 with task_id; when false, processes synchronously and returns 200.

GroupAddRequest.description: Each message must include sender_id for group conversations.

messages.description: Batch message array (1-500 items). sender_id is required per message.

async_mode.description: Enable async processing. When true, returns 202 with task_id; when false, processes synchronously and returns 200.
Enable async processing. When true, returns 202 with task_id; when false, processes synchronously and returns 200.

message.default: Message accepted and queued for processing

memory_type.description:
Memory type to query. Scope constraint per type:
- episodic_memory: supports both user_id and group_id
- profile: user_id only (group_id will return 400)
- agent_case: user_id only (group_id will return 400)
- agent_skill: user_id only (group_id will return 400)

filters.description: Filter conditions. Must contain user_id or group_id (see memory_type for scope constraints). Supports operators: eq (implicit), in, gt, gte, lt, lte. Combinators: AND, OR.

task_intent.description: Rewritten task intent as retrieval key

approach.description: Step-by-step approach with decisions and lessons

AgentSkillItem.description: Agent skill item (reusable skill from clustered cases)

description.description: What this skill does and when to use it

examples: What did Alice say about the project?

top_k.description: Max results. -1 = return all meeting threshold (up to 100)

radius.description: COSINE similarity threshold (0.0-1.0) for vector methods

filters.description: Filter conditions. Must contain user_id or group_id (agent_memory and profile require user_id only, same scope constraints as GET endpoint). Same DSL as GET endpoint.

SearchEpisodeItem.description: Episode search result with relevance score

atomic_facts.description: Atomic facts expanded from this episode

SearchAtomicFactItem.description: Atomic fact expanded from an episode

SearchProfileItem.description: Profile search result with relevance score

RawMessageDTO.description: Raw unprocessed message waiting for memory extraction

SearchAgentCaseItem.description: Agent case search result with relevance score

task_intent.description: Rewritten task intent as retrieval key

approach.description: Step-by-step approach with decisions and lessons

SearchAgentSkillItem.description: Agent skill search result with relevance score

description.description: What this skill does and when to use it

DeleteMemoriesRequest.description: Two modes: by ID (memory_id only) or by filters (user_id/group_id with optional session_id/sender_id). Mutually exclusive.

user_id.description: User ID scope for batch delete

group_id.description: Group ID scope for batch delete

sender_id.description: Sender filter, matches participants array (batch delete only)

PatchGroupRequest.description: At least one of name or description must be provided.

boundary.description: LLM config for boundary detection (fast, cheap model recommended)

extraction.description: LLM config for memory extraction (high quality model recommended)

llm_custom_setting.description: LLM custom settings for algorithm control

boundary_detection_timeout.description: MemCell auto-flush idle timeout in seconds

offline_profile_extraction_interval.description: Offline profile extraction interval in seconds

boundary_detection_timeout.description: MemCell auto-flush idle timeout in seconds

offline_profile_extraction_interval.description: Offline profile extraction interval in seconds

fileType.description: File type category. Max size: image=10MB, file=100MB, video=500MB

ObjectSignRequest.description: Gateway transparently forwards to MMS service. Request must wrap items in objectList array.

objectList.description: List of files to sign (supports batch signing)

fields.description: Form fields required for S3 POST upload (key, policy, x-amz-* headers, Content-Type)

maxSize.description: Maximum file size in bytes. image: 10MB, file: 100MB, video: 500MB

ObjectSignItem.description: Signed object item. MMS echoes back the request fields alongside generated signing info.

ObjectSignResponse.description: MMS service response format (Gateway transparent proxy, not standard ErrorResponse format)

error.description: Error message. 'OK' on success, error description on failure

status.description: MMS status code. 200 = success, 2018 = validation error

data.description: On success: contains objectList. On validation error: string error message.
